## Summary



## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded paths — used `HORIZON_BIN_PATH` / `HORIZON_ROOT_PATH` placeholders
- [ ] No personal data (name, email, GPG key, hostname) in committed files
- [ ] All commits include `Signed-off-by:` (DCO) — used `git commit -s`
- [ ] Tested on: Windows / Linux / macOS (check all that apply)
